function.name: add_fact
function.description: Stage a new fact triple (subject, predicate, object) into the worldgit store. Call this whenever you learn or observe something that should be recorded as a world-state fact. Facts are content-addressed; storing the same triple twice is a no-op.

subject.description: The entity this fact is about (e.g. 'Redis', 'payment-service').

confidence.description: Belief weight in [0.0, 1.0]. Omit or pass 1.0 for high-confidence facts.

db.description: Path to the worldgit SQLite database. Defaults to .worldgit/world.db.

function.name: add_decision
function.description: Stage a new agent decision with its fact dependencies. Call this when you make an architectural, strategic, or configuration decision so it can be tracked and invalidated when upstream facts change.

label.description: Short kebab-case slug for the decision (e.g. 'chose-redis-for-sessions').

content.description: Full reasoning text explaining why this decision was made.

depends_on.description: List of Fact IDs (from add_fact responses) this decision relied upon.

db.description: Path to the worldgit SQLite database. Defaults to .worldgit/world.db.

function.name: get_stale
function.description: Return staleness alerts for decisions whose upstream facts have changed since the last commit. Call this before acting on a prior decision to verify it is still valid. Returns an empty list when everything is consistent.

db.description: Path to the worldgit SQLite database. Defaults to .worldgit/world.db.
